title: Modern Controlling Keybind
description: This mod ONLY includes the Keybind module of Modern Controlling.
body:
# Modern Controlling Keybind This mod ONLY includes the Keybind module of [Modern Controlling](https://modrinth.com/project/modern-controlling).
At present, it can: - Better keybinding settings screen. Similar to [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling). - Export your keybinding settings as a file (or import). ## Note: - It is recommended to turn on "Force Unicode Font" in language settings to better use this mod. - You ***CAN*** use this mod in your modpack.
